title: dont fuck up rotation by Halos1
lyrics: ayy ayy let's get high beat mechanics 10' blunt blazing that kill it like tready & jason grow up in my basement homie don't fuck up rotation don't fuck up rotation don't fuck up rotation I said don't fuck up rotation don't fuck up rotation I got smoke tricks like gandalf the great no white lungs are good than the opposite of date no light tight at size i'm built lion on tie dye my hot wheels so hot box i turn on the frost mayday push call my sickest kids with papilloma oh my lord y'all get HOC love's not running sweet sweet sweet sweet sweet sweet your blunt look like seven dwarfs my blunt look like snow white widow crystals they so white merlin's magnify sack of weed in my motherfucking knees socks burning grams and moon rocks all we do is hot box smoking pot we smoking pot we smoking pot smoking more pot smoke a fat sack turn around & smoke another fat sack that's that need a hazmat cymbal on my dang dang all we do is smoke dang ay ain't no way ain't no way that i'm ever finna quit all i do is fucking smoke in the trap that's my shit ay we trapping in the trap and we trapped in this trap we ain't never coming back 10 blunts blazing that killer like freddy and jason crop up in my basement homie don't fuck up rotation don't fuck up rotation whooz don't fuck up rotation i said don't fuck up rotation whooz don't fuck up rotation 10 blunts blazing that killer like freddy and jason crop up in my basement homie don't fuck up rotation don't fuck up rotation whooz don't fuck up rotation i said don't fuck up rotation whooz don't fuck up rotation don't fuck up rotation whooz don't fuck up rotation i said don't fuck up rotation whooz don't fuck up rotation
